subject: Fermi  trigger No 663967527: Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs  <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:
V. Lipunov, V.Kornilov, E.Gorbovskoy, K.Zhirkov, N.Tyurina, P.Balanutsa, A.Kuznetsov, 
D. Vlasenko, G.Antipov, D.Zimnukhov, V.Senik, T.Pogrosheva, E.Minkina,

(Irkutsk State University, API),

M.L.H.Rodriguez (INAOE, OAGH)

(Kislovodsk Solar Station of the Pulkovo Observatory),

A. Gabovich, V.Yurkov 
(Blagoveschensk Educational State University)


MASTER-IAC robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in Spain (IAC Teide Observatory) started inspect of the Fermi GRB220115.81 (trigger No 663967527,20h 17m 36.00s , +29d 49m 01.2s, R=28.35) errorbox  38636 sec after notice time and 38663 sec after trigger time at 2022-01-16 06:09:45 UT, with upper limit up to  17.0 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 78 deg. The sun  altitude  is -23.0 deg. 

The galactic latitude b = -4 deg., longitude l = 69 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=1850754

We obtain a following upper limits.

Filter C is a clear (unfiltred) band. 


The observation and reduction will continue. 
The message may be cited.
